---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
---

## Description
What feature would you like to see? Why is it useful?

## Use Case
Describe the problem this solves or the opportunity it enables.

### Example
```python
# How would you use the new feature?
from aletheia import AgentGuard

guard = AgentGuard(custom_patterns=[...])
```

## Proposed Solution
How should this work from a user perspective?

## Alternatives
Any other approaches you've considered?

## Additional Context
- Related issues: #123
- Competitive features: LangChain Guard supports X, we should too
- Effort estimate: Small / Medium / Large
